channel.title: Pages on Mujtaba Bader
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Mujtaba Bader

item.title: About me
item.author: ma2bader@uwaterloo.ca (Mujtaba Bader)
item.description: Hi! My name is Mujtaba Bader and here’s a few things about me. I recently graduated from the University of Waterloo with a Bachelors of Mathematics, majoring in Applied Mathematics I’m very interested in Data Science and Machine Learning, and recently I’ve been diving in to the field of NLP I enjoy participating in Kaggle competitions, even if I don’t do the best I feel like I’m learning a lot Aside from Data Science, I’m also very pasionate about lifting weights, it’s something I’ve been doing for the last 6 years If you’d like to see some projects I’ve done, what I’m currently working on, and my monthly retrospect, you can read about it in the blog section, thanks for visiting!
